hypertrophy.reasoning: Today hits upper body horizontal and vertical pressing heavily. Target posterior chain and arms for balanced development without fatiguing already-taxed muscles.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: SUPERSET. Strength: DB Chest Press, 4 by 8. Strength: Single Arm Dumbbell Row, 4 by 10. Strength: Shoulder Press, 4 by 8 at 40 percent. Metcon: Workout: 12 Ab Mat Sit Ups, 8 Push Up, 6 Strict Pull Up. For hypertrophy, focus on glutes, hamstrings, rear delts.
